description: A dental office virtual receptionist that schedules appointments, handles patient inquiries, and manages new patient intake. Includes dental emergency detection and insurance verification prompts. Designed for dental practices of all sizes.
shortDescription: Dental office scheduling and patient intake with emergency detection.
